summary: Iteration 36 - Groww MF Statement Parser Testing: All 9 backend tests passed. Verified XLSX parser correctly extracts 6 MF holdings from real Groww statement with per-holding XIRR. Duplicate handling works (re-upload updates existing). All APIs (holdings/live, portfolio-overview, investment-summary) return correct data.

frontend_issues.notes: Frontend testing skipped per request (backend only)

critical_code_review_comments: statement_parser.py correctly detects header row at row 20 (0-indexed) for Groww format
Parser extracts all 11 columns: name, amc, category, sub_category, folio, source, quantity, invested_value, current_value, pnl, xirr
Source detection works: detects 'Groww' from Source column values in XLSX
Duplicate handling implemented: re-upload updates existing holdings by ISIN or name+category match
XIRR weighted average calculation in dashboard_v2.py correctly uses per-holding XIRRs from statement
portfolio-overview returns only 'Mutual Fund' category from real holdings (no transaction-based estimates)

/api/parse-statement-preview POST.note: Preview returns parsed holdings without saving to DB

/api/upload-statement POST.note: Saves holdings to DB, handles duplicates by updating

/api/holdings/live GET.note: Returns all 7 holdings (6 Groww + 1 eCAS) with per-holding XIRR

categories: Mutual Fund only - no SIP/FD/Stock from transactions

/api/portfolio-overview GET.note: Uses only holdings collection data, correct category classification

/api/dashboard/investment-summary GET.note: XIRR 17.78% is weighted average of per-holding XIRRs (expected range 15-22%)

Authentication.note: Both upload endpoints return 401 without auth token

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing demo user with uploaded Groww statement.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Groww MF statement parser fully verified. Parser handles headers at row 20, extracts per-holding XIRR, detects source as 'Groww'. Demo user now has 7 holdings: 6 from Groww statement (total ₹110K invested) + 1 eCAS (SBI Small Cap ₹10K). Weighted XIRR = 17.78%. All APIs return consistent data.
